# datahub_remote_executor_pool (Data Source)

Looks up an existing DataHub Remote Executor Pool by pool ID.

**DataHub Cloud only.** Remote Executor Pools are a DataHub Cloud feature. Reading this data source against an OSS DataHub instance will fail with a clear error.

## Common use cases

**Reference the reserved `default` pool** (auto-provisioned by DataHub Cloud; cannot be created via the `datahub_remote_executor_pool` resource):

```terraform
data "datahub_remote_executor_pool" "default" {
  pool_id = "default"
}

resource "datahub_ingestion_source" "bigquery" {
  # ...
  remote_executor_id = data.datahub_remote_executor_pool.default.pool_id
}
```

**Reference a pool created by another Terraform root module:**

```terraform
data "datahub_remote_executor_pool" "analytics" {
  pool_id = "analytics-team"
}
```

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up the reserved default pool (auto-provisioned by DataHub Cloud).
data "datahub_remote_executor_pool" "default" {
  pool_id = "default"
}

# Reference the default pool's ID in an ingestion source.
resource "datahub_ingestion_source" "bigquery" {
  source_name        = "BigQuery Production"
  remote_executor_id = data.datahub_remote_executor_pool.default.pool_id
  recipe = jsonencode({
    source = {
      type = "bigquery"
    }
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `pool_id` (String) The unique pool identifier to look up (e.g. `default`, `analytics-team`).

### Read-Only

- `channel` (String) Communication channel used by executors in this pool (`SQS` or `KAFKA`).
- `created_at` (Number) UTC timestamp (milliseconds since epoch) when this pool was created.
- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the pool.
- `is_default` (Boolean) Whether this pool is the global default for new ingestion sources.
- `is_embedded` (Boolean) Whether this pool is embedded in the DataHub Cloud coordinator pod.
- `state_message` (String) Error message when `state_status` is `PROVISIONING_FAILED`, otherwise empty.
- `state_status` (String) Provisioning state of the pool: `PROVISIONING_PENDING`, `PROVISIONING_IN_PROGRESS`, `READY`, `PROVISIONING_FAILED`, or `OLD_CHANNEL_DRAINING`.
- `urn` (String) Full DataHub URN for this pool (e.g. `urn:li:dataHubRemoteExecutorPool:default`).
